title: phyllanthus pavonianus
intro: Phyllanthus pavonianus, also known as Pavonia or Stonebreaker, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus pavonianus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and help manage kidney stones. Phyllanthus pavonianus can be prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support urinary health and relieve symptoms of kidney stone formation.
